response.original_title: Giants Marathon: The Nephilim to Catalina Island
response.overview: Across ancient worlds and biblical texts, stories persist of towering beings who once walked among humanity. From the Nephilim of scripture to giant legends found in cultures worldwide, the mystery refuses to fade. Reports of enormous skeletons, strange physical traits, and lost discoveries raise unsettling questions. Why are colossal beings tied to the origins of megalithic ancient sites of which we cannot duplicate today? Why has the evidence of Giants vanished? Journey through controversial finds, forgotten records and forbidden theories that challenge the official history of our world.
response.tagline: Reports of massive skeletons, strange traits, and lost discoveries spark questions about why evidence of giants vanished from history.
response.title: Giants Marathon: The Nephilim to Catalina Island
